inputs.label: Initial Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Initial concentration of the reactant before the reaction starts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial concentration of the reactant before the reaction starts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reaksiyon başlamadan önce reaktantın başlangıç konsantrasyonu.

inputs.label: Rate Constant
inputs.businessContext: Zero-order rate constant, representing the consumption rate per unit time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Zero-order rate constant, representing the consumption rate per unit time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfırıncı derece hız sabiti, birim zaman başına tüketim oranını temsil eder.

inputs.label: Reaction Time
inputs.businessContext: The time elapsed since the start of the reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: The time elapsed since the start of the reaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reaksiyonun başlangıcından bu yana geçen süre.

inputs.label: Target Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Desired concentration of the reactant to calculate the required reaction time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired concentration of the reactant to calculate the required reaction time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekli reaksiyon süresini hesaplamak için istenen reaktant konsantrasyonu.
